headline: Cantor Fitzgerald Lowers its Price Target on Universal Health Services, Inc. (UHS) to $229 and Maintains a Neutral Rating
summary: Universal Health Services, Inc. (NYSE:UHS) is among the 13 Most Undervalued S&P 500 Stocks to Invest In. On February 27, 2026, Cantor Fitzgerald lowered its price target on Universal Health Services, Inc. (NYSE:UHS) to $229 from $250 and maintained a Neutral rating.
